title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and library for running Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally with minimal setup.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models from any Python script.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript / TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same API surface as the Python library.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama models as LLM, chat, and embedding components.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, model management, multi-user, dark mode, mobile friendly).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java / Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent builder API, streaming, and Spring Boot starters.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem wrapping the Ollama REST API; supports chat, generate, pull, and embeddings.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI with syntax highlighting, chat history, and key-bindings reminiscent of ncchat.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into an inline coding copilot with autocomplete and chat.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and horizontal scaling.

title: ollama-chat
summary: Minimal React chat app backed by Ollama; showcases streaming responses and model switching.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin to query Ollama models inside buffers for code explanation, generation, and refactoring.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that caches and serves Ollama models inside CI pipelines for reproducible LLM tests.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Ready-to-run Retrieval-Augmented Generation stack using Ollama embeddings + Chroma + LangChain.

title: ollama-swift
summary: Swift Package Manager client for Ollama; async/await wrappers for iOS/macOS apps.

title: ollama-terraform
summary: Terraform module to provision Ollama on AWS EC2 GPU instances with CloudWatch logging.

title: ollama-model-library
summary: Community-curated collection of Modelfiles for StableLM, CodeLlama, Vicuna, Zephyr, and more.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that streams Ollama replies into threads with slash commands and model pickers.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to run local LLMs via Ollama for note summarization, Q&A, and brainstorming.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset allowing Ollama models to be used as generators or embedders in pipelines.
